name: create_message
description: Send a structured conversation to Claude and receive an AI-generated response. Supports multi-turn conversations with text and image content, system prompts, tool use, and configurable generation parameters.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: Array of message objects with 'role' (user/assistant) and 'content' (string or array of content blocks).

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate before stopping.

parameters.name: system
parameters.description: System prompt that sets the behavior and context for the assistant.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Sampling temperature between 0 and 1. Lower values are more deterministic.

parameters.name: top_p
parameters.description: Nucleus sampling parameter. Use either temperature or top_p, not both.

parameters.name: stop_sequences
parameters.description: Custom sequences that will cause the model to stop generating.

parameters.name: tools
parameters.description: Definitions of tools the model may use, each with name, description, and input_schema.

messages.content: What is the capital of France?

content.text: The capital of France is Paris.
